Status Ongoing
Type Manhwa
Released 2018
Author Chugong (Story), Jang, Sung-rak (Art)

Solo Leveling

나 혼자만 레벨업
Action Adventure Fantasy

Synopsis Solo Leveling

10 years ago, after “the Gate” that connected the real world with the monster world opened, some of the ordinary people received the power to hunt monsters.

Chapter Solo Leveling
